sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 379 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.25. 2. For orders on CMA No.439/2022. 3. For hearing of main case. 27.04.2026 Mr. Faheem Ali Memon, advocate holding brief for Mr. Munawwar Ali Memon, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2022 without any progress. Diary demonstrates that applicant has made no effort in the preceding four years to have the matter listed or heard. Even today brief is being held and adjournment is being sought on behalf of applicant for no cogent reason. It appears that applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
